subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Him Who hath been imprisoned in the path of God in this remote land, and upon Whom at every moment tribulations descend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الذی سجن فی سبیل الله فی هذه الارض البعید و ورد علیه فی کل حین
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @exhortations and counsels, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
